empty.noFindingsMessage: Run analysis to scan the workspace.
empty.noMatchMessage: No rows match the current filters.
empty.noProjectMessage: Open a Flutter or Dart project to see findings.
empty.noDataMessage: Run a scan to populate this dashboard.

loading.refreshingDashboard: Refreshing dashboard with the latest findings.
loading.analysisFailedDetail: Analysis failed. Check output for details.

a11y.toggleFullWidth: Schalten Sie das Layout in voller Breite um
a11y.announcer: Aktualisierungen des Filter- und Sortierstatus werden hier angekündigt.

pick.title: Saropa Lints Oberflächensprache
pick.placeholder: Sprache für Seitenleiste und Dashboards wählen

status.findingsAfterFilterTitle: Gesamtergebnisse nach dem Filter für deaktivierte Regeln
status.todoHackTitle: TODO and HACK markers found in workspace
status.driftOfflineTitle: Drift Advisor enabled but no server found

kpi.errorsTitle: Filter findings to errors (must fix — broken / will crash / exploitable)
kpi.warningsTitle: Filter findings to warnings (could fail or look bad)
kpi.infoTitle: Filter findings to info (FYI — style and suggestions)
kpi.filesTitle: Distinct files contributing at least one finding

toolbar.textFilterTitle: Filter findings by file path, rule, or message text
toolbar.textFilterPlaceholder: Filter by file, rule, or message…
toolbar.saveReportTitle: Save filtered violations as JSON to reports/YYYYMMDD/

progress.runningMeta: This can take a moment on large projects.

topRules.hideTitle: Hide for me only — workspace-level, reversible via Clear Suppressions
topRules.disableTitle: Disable for the whole project — writes analysis_options_custom.yaml and re-runs analysis

findings.overflowNote: Source list truncated at {max} for render performance.
findings.emptyNoViolations: No violations in the last analysis run.
findings.emptyNoMatch: No violations match the current filters.
findings.emptyHintNoData: Run analysis to populate `reports/.saropa_lints/violations.json`, then refresh.
findings.emptyHintFilters: Adjust filters or run analysis again to see findings.

charts.heading: Mix
charts.metaClickSlice: Klicken Sie auf ein Segment, um es zu filtern

todoHack.scanOff: Der Arbeitsbereich-Scan ist deaktiviert – aktivieren Sie diese Option, um Markierungen aus Projektdateien anzuzeigen.
todoHack.heading: TODOs & HACKS
todoHack.capNote: Scan hit max-file cap; raise `saropaLints.todosAndHacks.maxFilesToScan` for full coverage.

drift.enableBlurb: Enable Drift Advisor integration to surface database suggestions here.
drift.noServerBlurb: No Drift Advisor server found on configured ports.

suppressions.noneInExport: No analyzer suppressions in the current `violations.json` export. Run analysis after editing ignores or baselines to populate.
suppressions.totalRow: Gesamt – Filter löschen und Ergebnisse öffnen
suppressions.nothingHidden: Nothing hidden from the Issues list in this workspace. Use tree context actions to hide folders, files, or rules; they persist in workspace state.
suppressions.viewHidesFooter: Diese Blenden verkleinern nur die Liste der Probleme/Dashboards. Sie werden nicht in „violations.json“ geschrieben.

script.metaRunning: This can take a moment on large projects.
script.metaDone: Refreshing dashboard with the latest findings.
script.analysisFailedDetail: Analysis failed. Check output for details.

emptyState.hintAfterMessage: Run a Saropa Lints analysis to generate violations.json, then use Refresh here or reopen this dashboard.

shortcuts.activateKpi: Activate focused KPI card or chart bar
shortcuts.activateKpiSpace: Activate focused KPI card or chart bar

triageDash.zeroIssueRules: 0 Regeln ohne Probleme – in der Stufe automatisch aktiviert. {count}
triageDash.hintNoViolations: No `reports/.saropa_lints/violations.json` yet. Run analysis, then refresh this tab.
triageDash.hintUnreadable: No readable violations export. Run Saropa Lints analysis first.
triageDash.hintStale: Die Triage-Daten sind möglicherweise veraltet (der Export ist 0 alt). Führen Sie die Analyse für aktuelle Gruppen erneut durch. {age}
triageDash.hintNoPerRule: Bei diesem Export gibt es keine Problemanzahl pro Regel. Analysieren Sie erneut mit einem aktuellen Saropa Lints-Plugin.
triageDash.hintBuildFailed: Could not build triage from this export. Run a fresh analysis.
triageDash.hintSameAsTree: Same grouping as the Triage activity-bar tree: filter Issues, or disable/enable rules in `analysis_options_custom.yaml`. Large groups may ask for confirmation.

kbdOverlay.footer: Press Esc or click outside to close.

wideReport.noReportYet: No violations report yet. Run Saropa Lints analysis first.
wideReport.driftNotConnected: Drift Advisor server is not connected.
wideReport.saveReportNoWorkspace: Open a workspace folder before saving the report.

scanning.heading: Scanning packages
scanning.body1: Saropa is fetching pub.dev metadata, GitHub activity, and dependency graphs for every direct dependency in this project.
scanning.body2: Diese Seite wird automatisch aktualisiert, wenn der Scan abgeschlossen ist. Sie können den Vorgang über die Fortschrittsbenachrichtigung unten rechts abbrechen.

summary.caveatLine1: *Archive sizes before tree shaking. Actual app size will be smaller.
summary.caveatLine2: Activity thresholds: 90d = stale, 180d = dormant (commit + release timelines).

toolbar.resetViewTitle: Reset filters, sort, and saved view state
toolbar.rescanTitle: Rescan packages — clears the pub.dev cache and re-fetches versions
toolbar.openOtherTitle: Open another pubspec.yaml's project in a new window for Vibrancy scan
toolbar.footprintGroupTitle: Was die Spalte „Größe“ anzeigt: nur eigenes Archiv plus eindeutige Transitive (Kosten bei Entfernung) oder plus alle Transitive (theoretisches Maximum).
toolbar.footprintOwnTitle: Own archive size only — matches pub.dev download size
toolbar.footprintUniqueTitle: Own size + transitives used only by this dep (savings if you remove it)
toolbar.footprintTotalTitle: Own size + all transitives, including ones shared with other deps
toolbar.devToggleTitle: Include dev dependencies in table and totals

name.label: Package
name.tooltip: Package name — click to open pubspec.yaml entry

published.label: Published
published.tooltip: Date the installed version was published to pub.dev

activity.label: Activity
activity.tooltip: Code-and-release activity grade from commit + publish recency

likes.label: Likes
likes.tooltip: pub.dev gefällt mir – klicken Sie, um die Seite mit der Paketbewertung zu öffnen

downloads.label: Downloads
downloads.tooltip: pub.dev-Downloads in den letzten 30 Tagen – klicken Sie, um die Seite mit der Paketbewertung zu öffnen

issues.label: Issues
issues.tooltip: Open GitHub issues (excludes pull requests when available)

size.label: Size
size.tooltip: Archive size on pub.dev (before tree shaking)

deps.label: Deps
deps.tooltip: Direct transitive dependencies — shared deps highlighted

files.label: References
files.tooltip: Number of source files that import this package — click to search

transitives.label: Transitive
transitives.tooltip: Number of transitive (indirect) dependencies this package pulls in

vulns.label: Vulns
vulns.tooltip: Known security vulnerabilities from OSV and GitHub Advisory databases

update.label: Aktualisieren
update.tooltip: Available version update: major, minor, or patch

status.label: Status
status.tooltip: Nutzungsstatus: ob das Paket in Ihrem Code unbenutzt erscheint

shortcuts.toggleDetail: Schalten Sie den hervorgehobenen Paketdetail-Expander um
shortcuts.escapeSearch: Clear focused search; second Esc collapses all expanded rows
shortcuts.historyBack: Go back through the package navigation history

search.placeholder: Search title, description, or command id…

bands.recentHint: Click to run again · Newest first

shortcuts.homeEnd: Jump to the first or last visible row
